holdings.infoBox: TPHD is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are WEC Energy Group stock at 1.65%, Alliant Energy at 1.64%, Evergy at 1.63%, DTE Energy Company at 1.58%, and Ameren at 1.57%.

overview.description: The Timothy Plan High Dividend Stock ETF (TPHD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks a volatility-weighted index of US high dividend large-caps screened for Christian values. TPHD was launched on Apr 29, 2019 and is issued by Timothy Plan.
infoTable: Victory US Large Cap High Dividend Volatility Weighted BRI Index
